productIdentity.corePrinciple: Everything stays alive. Feed, tabs, drawer, search, graph and collection lens must preserve spatial continuity.

forbidden: force collection click to full page takeover
reset feed scroll when opening drawer
turn feed tabs into route navigation
make object cards the only reading entry

allowedSurfaces: /collections/ as index of folder and series lenses
/collections/[slug]/ as generated static reading session for folder and series only
collectionModel.topicCollectionRule: Topic collections are metadata/search/Graph dimensions in the runtime index and must not be batch prerendered into static collection pages.

preferredInteraction.urlBehavior: sync state without forcing full reload

forbidden: collection route takeover as primary flow

objectModel.projectionRule: Pages do not define object semantics. Objects define page projections.

forbidden: admin panel visual language on reader surfaces

regressionGuards.rule: Homepage must render mixed object feed, not only collection cards.
Feed tabs must filter client-side without full page navigation.
Drawer body must prioritize active object content over collection grid.
Collection is contextual lens, not primary page takeover.
